response.global_analysis: The video begins with a segment of 'BLUE CLAPPER' followed by the full performance of 'Breaking Dimensions' by Hololive English -Justice-. The provided Reference JSON only contained lyrics for the first chorus of 'Breaking Dimensions', so I have manually transcribed the remaining verses, bridge, and final chorus, as well as the 'BLUE CLAPPER' intro and the spoken outro announcement segment. All timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, and on-screen text for song titles and merchandise has been included.
